title: Document Python TUI support matrix and smoke-test procedure
description: Why this exists: the client spans multiple transports and host OS Bluetooth stacks, so supported combinations must be explicit. What needs to be done: document supported host OS versions, BLE stack assumptions, IP/CoAP path assumptions, firmware prerequisites, known unsupported operations, visual target notes, and manual smoke-test procedures for both direct BLE and IP/CoAP. Acceptance criteria: docs cover Linux BLE, macOS BLE, IP/CoAP local node path, fake/native_sim mode, and hardware smoke test; limitations are explicit; missing hardware validation creates follow-up Beads rather than being hidden.
